title: orchis tridentata subsp. hanrii
intro: Orchis tridentata subsp. hanrii is a rare and unique sub-species of the orchid family, specifically a type of terrestrial orchid known for its distinctive flowers with a white and yellow coloration. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, and it is believed to possess medicinal properties due to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits associated with this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. In terms of herbal preparations, Orchis tridentata subsp. hanrii is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the skin for therapeutic purposes.
